导师团队实战案例解析【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239090068_64381023<br>vk.com/topic-239044265_63794072<br>vk.com/topic-239100578_64381029<br>vk.com/topic-239079469_64650943<br>vk.com/topic-239100576_64212385<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64491905<br>vk.com/topic-239100472_64491907<br>vk.com/topic-239043430_64952931<br>vk.com/topic-239100507_65324965<br>vk.com/topic-239100512_64491925<br>vk.com/topic-239100493_64067260<br>vk.com/topic-239049388_64381050<br>vk.com/topic-239100475_63794064<br>vk.com/topic-239100473_64067271<br>vk.com/topic-239100606_64212419<br>vk.com/topic-239049142_64491941<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64212386<br>vk.com/topic-239100509_64650984<br>vk.com/topic-239100501_65530992<br>vk.com/topic-239100519_64650990<br>vk.com/topic-239056832_64491971<br>vk.com/topic-239100479_64650992<br>vk.com/topic-239100514_63877795<br>vk.com/topic-239100516_64212458<br>vk.com/topic-239100486_64212460<br>vk.com/topic-239100474_63877796<br>vk.com/topic-239100484_63877797<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65530998<br>vk.com/topic-239100907_65325046<br>vk.com/topic-239100490_64952999<br>vk.com/topic-239050530_64953001<br>vk.com/topic-239100476_64212474<br>vk.com/topic-239100515_63794179<br>vk.com/topic-2391004
